decks.notes: This deck focuses on rapidly reducing your own life total to enhance the power of Death's Shadow, while also using aggressive creatures and disruption spells to control the board and apply pressure to the opponent. Fear of Missing Out and Moonshadow help to further push the power of Death's Shadow, while cards like Fatal Push and Thoughtseize provide key removal and disruption. The deck aims to be efficient and proactive, setting up an early game advantage and maintaining pressure throughout the match.

This deck focuses on ramping up mana quickly using Eldrazi Temple and other ramp spells to cast powerful Eldrazi creatures like Emrakul, the Promised End and Sire of Seven Deaths. The control aspect comes from cards like Kozilek's Command and Ugin, Eye of the Storms to deal with opponent's threats while disrupting their game plan. Additionally, cards like Devourer of Destiny and Malevolent Rumble provide additional removal and disruption. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with big threats and control elements to secure victory.

This deck focuses on quickly playing low-cost spells and creatures to apply early pressure on the opponent. By efficiently utilizing cards like Lightning Bolt and Monastery Swiftspear, the aim is to deal damage swiftly and efficiently. The deck also includes tools like Mishra's Bauble and Expressive Iteration to maintain consistency and card advantage. With a mix of burn spells, creatures with haste, and cantrips, this aggro deck aims to overwhelm the opponent before they can stabilize or build up their own board presence.

The deck focuses on utilizing creatures with abilities that allow for synergy and toolbox-like effects. By using cards like Yawgmoth, Thran Physician and Agatha's Soul Cauldron, the deck can control the board while setting up combos with creatures like Badgermole Cub and Delighted Halfling. The inclusion of Green Sun's Zenith adds consistency to the deck's creature toolbox strategy. The deck also includes cards like Malevolent Rumble and Dredger's Insight for additional control and card advantage. The use of Boseiju, Who Endures and Spymaster's Vault adds versatility and protection to the deck's game plan.

The deck focuses on quickly deploying artifact creatures and using various artifacts to buff them and disrupt the opponent. It aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast, aggressive strategy while also having ways to control the game through cards like Engineered Explosives and Metallic Rebuke. The deck leverages the synergy between artifacts and artifact creatures, creating a strong synergy that can be difficult for opponents to deal with effectively. Additionally, the deck utilizes cards like Urza's Saga and Mishra's Bauble to generate card advantage and maintain pressure on the opponent.

This deck focuses on flooding the board with artifacts and using them to generate value and control the game. By utilizing cards like Mox Opal and Urza's Saga, along with a mix of creatures and artifacts, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent quickly with aggressive threats. Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Arcbound Ravager provide recursion and synergy with artifacts, while cards like Engineered Explosives and Metallic Rebuke offer disruption and control. With a combination of aggression and versatility, the deck aims to outpace and outmaneuver opponents in Modern 1 vs 1 matches.

The deck focuses on using a combination of cards to quickly assemble a winning combo without relying on traditional lands. By utilizing cards like Lotus Bloom and Whir of Invention, the deck aims to generate enough mana to cast powerful spells like Goblin Charbelcher or Hydroelectric Specimen. Disrupting Shoal and Counterspell provide protection, while cards like Into the Flood Maw and Sink into Stupor help control the opponent's board. The deck's unique strategy allows for explosive plays and unexpected wins in Modern 1 vs 1 format.

The deck focuses on aggressive plays with efficient creatures like Pinnacle Emissary and Kappa Cannoneer, backed up by disruption from cards like Metallic Rebuke and Engineered Explosives. The deck also utilizes the artifact synergy of Mox Opal and Urza's Saga to generate advantage and pressure the opponent. Emry, Lurker of the Loch serves as a card advantage engine while cards like Tormod's Crypt and Welding Jar help disrupt graveyard strategies. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a mix of creatures, artifacts, and disruption in a fast-paced game plan.

This deck focuses on utilizing aggressive creatures with high power and toughness, as well as efficient removal spells and counter magic to control the board and quickly defeat the opponent. The deck also heavily relies on Leylines to provide additional support and protection for its creatures. The mana base is carefully constructed to ensure consistent casting of spells and to support the diverse color requirements of the deck. With a solid mix of creatures, removal, and protection, this deck aims to dominate the battlefield and overwhelm the opponent before they can mount a defense.

This deck focuses on playing aggressive creatures and using efficient spells to quickly deal damage to the opponent. The key strategy is to control the board with early creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Territorial Kavu, while also using powerful cards like Scion of Draco and Tribal Flames to close out the game quickly. Leyline of the Guildpact and Leyline Binding help protect your creatures and disrupt the opponent's game plan. Teferi, Time Raveler provides additional disruption and card advantage, while Arena of Glory helps pump up your creatures for a final push.

The focus of this deck is to utilize the Amulet of Vigor to quickly ramp up to play powerful threats like Primeval Titan and Cultivator Colossus. By using cards like Arboreal Grazer and Green Sun's Zenith, the player can accelerate their mana production to set up for game-ending plays like Scapeshift. The inclusion of Urza's Saga provides additional utility while Boseiju, Who Endures protects key combo pieces. This deck aims to assemble its combo pieces efficiently to overwhelm opponents with its powerful board presence and win the game quickly.

The deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana with cards like Arboreal Grazer and Amulet of Vigor to cast powerful threats like Primeval Titan and Cultivator Colossus. It uses cards like Summoner's Pact and Green Sun's Zenith to tutor for key pieces of the combo. The deck aims to win by assembling the Amulet Titan combo, generating a large amount of mana and triggering abilities to overwhelm the opponent. It also includes cards like Scapeshift and Malevolent Rumble for additional win conditions or disruption. The deck relies on efficient sequencing and strong decision-making to execute its game plan effectively.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells. It utilizes cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer to put pressure on the opponent early in the game. The deck also includes control elements such as Mana Tithe and Static Prison to disrupt the opponent's game plan. With a mix of creatures, burn spells, and disruptive elements, this Boros Aggro deck aims to close out games quickly before the opponent has a chance to stabilize.

The deck focuses on quickly deploying aggressive creatures and utilizing cards that provide additional value or protection for those creatures. It includes a mix of efficient creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls, along with powerful spells like Galvanic Discharge and Lightning Bolt. The deck also utilizes cards that can disrupt the opponent's game plan, such as Goblin Bombardment and Static Prison. The mana base is designed to support the deck's aggressive strategy, with a mix of fetch lands and dual lands to ensure consistent access to the necessary colors of mana.

The concept of this deck is to control the board through removal spells and land destruction while also utilizing creatures and enchantments that provide additional value. By disrupting the opponent's mana base and graveyard, the deck aims to slow down aggressive strategies and gain an advantage over the opponent. The inclusion of Kaheera as a companion adds an additional creature to the deck while also providing a slight benefit to the archetype. Overall, the deck focuses on controlling the game and outlasting the opponent through strategic play and resource management.

The deck focuses on assembling a powerful combo involving Basking Broodscale, Glaring Fleshraker, and Devourer of Destiny to generate a massive amount of mana and overwhelm the opponent with creatures. The key is to quickly ramp up your mana with Eldrazi Temple and Urza's Saga to unleash devastating threats like Emrakul, the Promised End and Walking Ballista. Blade of the Bloodchief and Kozilek's Command provide additional utility and removal, while Ancient Stirrings helps in finding key pieces of the combo. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent quickly and efficiently.
